debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ ∑ e, @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeCount V inst✝ G u v p ↑e = @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.length V G u v p

failed_attempts:
rw [Finset.sum_subtype (edgeCount p), List.sum_count_toFinset_eq_length]
  induction p <;> simp [edges, darts, length, *]

have : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  simp [this, edgeCount, edgeSet, ← List.count_eq_countP, eq_comm]
  norm_cast
  exact (Multiset.sum_count_toFinset ↑p.edges).symm

have h : p.length = p.edges.length := by
    induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  simp [h, edgeCount, edgeSet, Finset.sum_coe_sort, List.countP_eq_count, List.sum_count_toFinset_eq_length]

have h : p.edges.length = p.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
  simp [edgeCount, edgeSet, h, List.sum_count_toFinset_eq_length, List.count_eq_countP, eq_comm]

have h : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]

  simp [edgeCount, List.count, eq_comm]

have : p.length = p.edges.length := by induction p <;> simp [length, edges, darts, *]
